author: DominicVainMod
content:
Star Atlas DAO PIP-1 Update

Hi @everyone, an update on the Star Atlas DAO proposal (PIP-1) status:

The new DAO feature release, announced in the latest Town Hall, is on the verge of a live deployment. We are working towards the launch, originally planned for today, and will be providing an update tomorrow.

Thank you for your patience and understanding as we strive to deliver a Star Atlas DAO with the highest quality features and fully aligned with the values  of our community. 

Thank you for your ongoing support in bringing power to the people!
